principle: Separate internal/service lore from narration, POV thoughts, and spoken dialogue.

rule.narration: May describe only what POV can perceive or what has been established in-scene.
rule.akira_thoughts: May not explain hidden lore that Akira does not remember/know.
rule.npc_dialogue: May reveal facts if the NPC knows them and has a reason to say them.
rule.after_dialogue: Akira may register the words spoken, but not automatically understand deeper lore.
rule.internal_cards: Can guide NPC behavior, but must not leak as narrator explanation.

forbidden_as_narrator_fact_until_known: это энергия Кайроса, которую она узнала
